---
id: create-space
title: "Create A Space"
description: "Create a space. When parentSpaceId is empty, a top-level (root) space will be created; if not empty, a child space will be created under the specified parent space."
sidebar_label: "Create A Space"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create A Space"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a space. When parentSpaceId is empty, a top-level (root) space will be created; if not empty, a child space will be created under the specified parent space.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Parent space ID. When empty, a top-level (root) space will be created; if not empty, a child space will be created under the specified parent space."},"name":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"description":"Space name, cannot be an empty string."}},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"Living Room"},"title":"CreateSpaceRequest"},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"Living Room"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID of the newly created space."}}}],"example":{"type":"CreateSpaceResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000006","code":0,"message":"success","data":"space-livingroom-001"},"title":"CreateSpaceResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
